one_time_description: Restructuring of long-term debt - principal forgiveness of $155,440 and interest forgiveness of $57,232
economic_notes: Lagoon expansion project underway funded by ISC totaling $13,562,535 received to date. First Nation operates consolidated entities including general store, housing authority, construction, cattle ranch, cannabis (Birdtail Sioux Bud Ltd.), and other enterprises.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED on three bases: (1) insufficient audit evidence over Education Department other revenue of $1,786,915, expenses of $1,108,582, and deferred revenue of $1,751,087; (2) no budget comparison presented as required by PSAS; (3) completeness of Asset Retirement Obligations (PS 3280) could not be confirmed. Fiscal year ends March 31 2023 not 2024. Province is Manitoba not AB. Large restricted cash balance of $9,578,258 relates to ISC-funded lagoon expansion project. 12 entities fully consolidated including cannabis operations (Birdtail Sioux Bud Ltd. and LP). Notes payable of $561,909 and due to ISC of $384,158 also in liabilities. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $24,776,316 + CMHC $149,693. OSR = total revenue $19,712,852 minus net government transfers recognized (ISC net of deferrals and CMHC) — calculated as Sales $1,925,178 + Other revenue $3,642,813 + First Peoples Development Inc. $245,283 - net deferred adjustments attributable to non-government = approximately $5,813,274 but reported as total revenue minus government transfers. Remuneration schedule data not extracted from document text provided.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
